items.name_cn:
New Lady D 🌟 Calfskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant classic style, meticulously crafted from nude pink calfskin, paired with a light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size 26cm

items.name_en: 【Black Paris💯Five-Grid Embroidered Lady Dior】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Lady Dior bag "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, it adds a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. It comes with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. The detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket, and patch pocket allow it to be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.
